name: gmail
title: Gmail MCP Server
description: Read, search, send, and manage Gmail messages via the Gmail REST API.

toolDetails.name: gmail_list_messages
toolDetails.description: List recent inbox messages, optionally filtered with Gmail search syntax.

toolDetails.name: gmail_get_message
toolDetails.description: Fetch a full Gmail message by ID, including decoded text and HTML bodies.

toolDetails.name: gmail_send_email
toolDetails.description: Send an email through Gmail, encoded as RFC 2822 and submitted base64url.

toolDetails.name: gmail_search_messages
toolDetails.description: Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax (e.g. 'is:unread', 'from:x@y.com').

toolDetails.name: gmail_mark_read
toolDetails.description: Mark a Gmail message as read by removing the UNREAD label.
